mnemonics: CRISPS - Column, Range, Index, Source, Profile, Subject - Remember the components of an Information Package
keyPoints: Information Packages define the structure of a data warehouse before design begins
They contain business dimensions, hierarchies, and measurement metrics
They serve as a communication tool between business users and technical developers
commonMistakes: Confusing Information Packages with physical database schemas
Omitting business context and focusing only on technical requirements
Creating packages without input from actual business stakeholders
